description_long: This object is a long, cylindrical rifle with a predominantly matte black finish and a streamlined, tactical appearance. The barrel is extended and features a series of vent holes along its length, likely for heat dissipation, and a prominent muzzle device at the front. A fixed sight post is mounted on top, and a tubular magazine runs parallel beneath the barrel, suggesting a pump-action or lever-action mechanism. The stock is minimal or absent, with the rear end of the rifle terminating in a rounded, solid cap. Small red accents are visible near the muzzle, adding a touch of color contrast to the otherwise monochrome design. The overall construction appears robust, with metallic surfaces and a few polymer or composite components.
description: A sleek, black rifle with a long vented barrel, tubular magazine, and minimal or absent stock, featuring red accents near the muzzle and a fixed sight post.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, vented barrel, tubular magazine, and red accent near the muzzle.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular muzzle device and the narrow, cylindrical profile of the barrel.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same features as view 0, with clear visibility of the vent holes and sight post.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the rounded end cap and the alignment of the barrel and magazine tube.
